query:
ALTER TABLE `users`
  ADD COLUMN `tenantId` int NOT NULL DEFAULT 1 AFTER `id`,
  ADD COLUMN `lineId` varchar(128) NULL AFTER `googleId`,
  ADD COLUMN `googleId` varchar(128) NULL AFTER `avatarUrl`,
  ADD COLUMN `storeId` varchar(50) NULL AFTER `accumulatedSpending`,
  ADD COLUMN `internalContact` varchar(100) NULL AFTER `storeId`,
  ADD COLUMN `department` varchar(100) NULL AFTER `internalContact`,
  ADD COLUMN `status` enum('active','suspended') NOT NULL DEFAULT 'active' AFTER `department`,
  ADD COLUMN `permissions` json NULL AFTER `status`;
